tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible diabetes, and a slightly increased creatinine, suggesting reduced kidney function. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, urea, and calcium, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of glycemic status and renal function.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
